memoryArtifacts.headline: 1697: Waitstill Webber & Meribah Hutchins group sheet with sources
memoryArtifacts.description:
(Samuel Webber v. George Burroughs ) 
George Burroughs Executed August 19, 1692

"Samuel Webber aged about 36 years Testifieth and sayth that 
aboute seaven or eight Yeares agoe I Lived at Casco Bay and George Burroughs was then Minester there, and haveing heard much of the 
great strength of him s'd Burroughs ; he Coming to our house wee 
ware in discourse about the same and he then told mee that he had 
put his fingers into the Bung of a Barrell of Malasses and lifted it 
up, and carryed it Round him and sett it downe againe. 

Salem August 2'd 1692."   

George Burroughs was the subject in Arthur Miller's "The Crucible."

zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Webber於1656年4月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克時，他的父親Thomas Webber28歲，母親Mary Parker20歲。他於1680年8月與Deborah Littlefield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1716年5月16日在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Webber于1656年4月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克时，他的父亲Thomas Webber28岁，母亲Mary Parker20岁。他于1680年8月与Deborah Littlefield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1716年5月16日在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Webber was born on 12 April 1656, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Webber, was 28 and his mother, Mary Parker, was 20. He married Deborah Littlefield in August 1680, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 16 May 1716, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Webberが1656年4月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークで生まれた時，父Thomas Webberは28歳，母Mary Parkerは20歳であった。1680年8月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークでDeborah Littlefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1716年5月16日に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Webber(이)가 1656년 4월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Webber(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Parker(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1680년 8월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 Deborah Littlefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1716년 5월 16일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Webber nasceu em 12 de abril de 1656, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Webber, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Parker, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Deborah Littlefield em agosto de 1680, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de maio de 1716, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Webber родился 12 апреля 1656 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Webber было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Parker, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Deborah Littlefield август 1680 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 16 мая 1716 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.
